Title: The Royal Tenenbaums
Actors: Gene Hackman, Gwyneth Paltrow, Anjelica Huston
Plot: Three grown prodigies, all with a unique genius of some kind, and their mother are staying at the family household. Their father, Royal had left them long ago, and comes back to make things right with his family.
Awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 11 wins & 46 nominations total
